fixtures/shows/raw/2025-10-consultants-r.name: Additional rooms
fixtures/shows/raw/2025-10-consultants-r.setup: We have a closed door breakfast on Tuesday morning from 07.50 - 08.50 AM but as of now, there is no AV that will be needed. General Breakfast will be in GB C. For the Point Counterpoint session at 11:45am on Tuesday, we will need a lectern at each end of the stage with chairs in the middle for the next panel. It will be a debate format. 2 Podiums will be provided for Point Counterpoint session mentioned above General Session
fixtures/shows/raw/2025-10-consultants-r.notes: Lunch will be held in GB C and coffee breaks and registration in the GB foyer. Cocktails and Dinner on Tuesday is offsite; early cocktails and dinner in Lakeview Ballroom Both Lunches will most likely have speakers/awards ceremony and will need AV
